payload.body:
Implementation handoff / blocker:

- Resolved repository `repo_16371` as `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle` and ticket `UKN-WB555`.
- Transitioned the ticket to `in-progress` before code work. Assignment could not be performed because the exposed Cycle MCP tool surface does not include a current-user or assignment operation.
- Attempted to create dedicated worktree `cycle/UKN-WB555-dependency-relationships` at `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle-UKN-WB555` from `origin/main`.
- Blocked by current Codex filesystem sandbox: the session is read-only, and Git cannot create `.git/refs/heads/cycle/UKN-WB555-dependency-relationships.lock` (`Operation not permitted`). Git also cannot create its usual `/tmp/xcrun_db-*` cache files.
- No source changes were made, no tests were run, no commit was created, and no branch was pushed.

Known limitation: rerun this ticket in a read-write workspace/sandbox so the required worktree, implementation, tests, commit, push, and `In Review` transition can be completed.
